creator: leres@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to O. Hartmann from comment #0)
> Using the most recent port and toolchain devel/xtensa-esp-elf 
> with ESP-IDF v5.3, gives me an error shown below.

> [esp-idf]: /usr/local/xtensa-esp-elf/bin/xtensa-esp32-elf-gcc --version
> xtensa-esp-elf-gcc (crosstool-NG UNKNOWN) 13.2.0

Hum... You don't say what version of the port you have but I do not believe it is "the most recent". As of ea2a77b (xtensa-esp-elf-13.2.0.20240530_2) I see:

    ice 1462 % /usr/local/xtensa-esp-elf/bin/xtensa-esp32-elf-gcc --version
    xtensa-esp-elf-gcc (crosstool-NG esp-13.2.0_20240530) 13.2.0

Could you please test with this version and report back?
